principle: Prefer official API/RSS/open-data/Creative-Commons/public-domain. Do not copy unknown-license datasets into this public repo. For official sites with captcha/session, expose manual lookup links or local importers only.

official_manual_sources.reason: Official lookup, may use captcha/session; no bypass.
official_manual_sources.repo_behavior: Return official link and step-by-step manual lookup guidance.

official_manual_sources.reason: Official lookup, may use verification code/captcha and personal data; no scraping/bypass.
official_manual_sources.repo_behavior: Return official link and manual lookup guidance.

official_manual_sources.source: Bộ GDĐT and official university admissions pages
official_manual_sources.reason: No reliable open API found; admissions data changes by school/year.
official_manual_sources.repo_behavior: Link official ministry/school pages, optionally import local legally obtained CSV/JSON.

not_accepted: Random driving-school PDFs without redistribution license
needs_legal_dataset_import.repo_behavior: Keep sample dataset only; provide importer scripts for legal local data.
Keep sample dataset only; provide importer scripts for legal local data.

acceptable_sources: CC/public-domain medical education material with attribution
not_accepted: Medical advice copied from proprietary sites
needs_legal_dataset_import.repo_behavior: Use self-authored low-risk guidance with doctor disclaimer.

not_accepted: Copied joke collections from sites without license

rejected_or_unreliable_search_hits.reason: Search returned spam/casino-injected pages for relevant queries; do not rely on these results without manual verification.

rejected_or_unreliable_search_hits.source: Scribd / Slideshare / random PDF mirrors for driving questions
rejected_or_unreliable_search_hits.reason: May contain the desired questions but redistribution license is unclear; do not commit copied content.
Useful for discovery, but not official dataset source and may have proprietary content.
